supply_chain.dependencies: Limited number of shipyards with capability and capacity to build, repair, maintain and/or upgrade ships. Significant quantities of goods and services sourced from global supply base. Ship construction contracts with Fincantieri in Italy and Meyer Werft in Germany.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions, labor shortages, significant material cost inflation, extended lead times for critical items, work stoppages, insolvencies, force majeure events or financial difficulties experienced by shipyards, subcontractors and suppliers. Volatility in commodity prices (steel) used in ship construction. Global supply markets impacted by global events and increased inflation.

regulatory_risks: IMO 2023 Strategy on Reduction of GHG Emissions from Ships requiring net zero emissions by 2050
EU Emissions Trading System (ETS) requiring emission allowances for EU waters
FuelEU Maritime regulation requiring GHG intensity limits and shore power usage
Energy Taxation Directive (ETD) proposed amendments introducing maritime fuel taxation
Norway regulations requiring Tier III NOx compliance and zero GHG emissions in World Heritage Fjords by 2032
MARPOL regulations on air emissions, sulfur content, ballast water management
IMO Carbon Intensity Indicator (CII) and Energy Efficiency Existing Ship Index (EEXI)
US Clean Water Act and Vessel Incidental Discharge Act (VIDA)
Alaska state environmental requirements more stringent than federal
California environmental requirements for water discharges and air emissions
GDPR and CCPA data privacy regulations
Anti-money laundering and anti-corruption laws
Economic sanctions and trade protection laws
Tax law changes including OECD Global Minimum Tax rules
US Maritime Transportation Security Act and Cruise Vessel Security and Safety Act
Port State Control inspections and compliance requirements
CDC and EU SHIPSAN health regulations
International Labor Organization and STCW labor standards
Helms-Burton Act Title III trafficking claims
Potential restrictions on cruise ships and guests in certain ports and destinations
UK tonnage tax regime requirements
Italian tonnage tax regime requirements
European Commission approval requirements for Italian economic benefits

sanction_risks: Helms-Burton Act Title III lawsuit related to Cuba operations
International sanctions and measures impacting operations
Trade restrictions affecting supply chain and operations
